name: Usage of EC2 Serial Console to Push an SSH Public Key
description: Simulates an attacker pushing their SSH public key to an EC2 instance via the serial console API, which bypasses security groups and network ACLs — providing access even when port 22 is blocked.
prerequisites: An EC2 instance. Serial console access must be enabled at the account level.
detection_signal: CloudTrail ec2-instance-connect:SendSerialConsoleSSHPublicKey — a niche API almost never called in normal operations
